headline: Chipotle Mexican Grill: Not A Buy, Pending Sales Growth And P/E Moderation
summary: CMG's comparable sales trends have notably weakened, with FY2025 at -1.7% YoY and FY2026 at flat guidance, contrasting with historical growth rates.

raw.headline: Chipotle Mexican Grill: Not A Buy, Pending Sales Growth And P/E Moderation

headline: How 10 major restaurant chains are overhauling their strategies
summary: From Wendy’s to Outback, heavyweight brands are investing in new menu items and operational improvements  — often accompanied by closures and renovations — to get back on track.

headline: El Pollo Loco: Taking Bites Out Of Chipotle
summary: El Pollo Loco has executed an asset-light turnaround, driving a ~30% stock gain and outperforming peers. Click here to read my earnings analysis of LOCO stock.

headline: The S&P 500's Thanksgiving Leftover Stocks In March 2026
summary: The Thanksgiving Leftover Stocks are a group of ten stocks that Seeking Alpha's Jason Capul identified as "Thanksgiving leftovers no one wants".
